description: Construct a 'Cradle-to-Grave' life cycle model for a 1.0 kg PVC pipe product named 'PVC Pipe Life Cycle Assembly' using the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip) and LCIA methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip). The model must include the production of 1.0 kg of 'Resin, polyvinyl chloride', transport of the pipe for 2500 km using a diesel-powered combination truck, and end-of-life disposal of 1.0 kg to a 'Sanitary landfill'. Perform an LCIA calculation using the TRACI 2.1 method and export the results to ~/LCA_Results/pvc_lifecycle_results.csv.
